name: Synthetic Dreams: Falling
short_description: Synthetic Dreams: Falling is a science-fiction visual novel about human feelings, friendship, love and memories.
detailed_description:
Under the pressure of circumstances, some people lose their purpose in life, sinking to the very bottom of existence, forgetting about moral principles, and for their resurrection, someone is needed who will shine in this darkness, extending a helping hand.

Also in this story. Don, a 19-year-old student graduating from college. For the past few years, his days have been repeating themselves day after day, not bringing pleasure, but only continuing to press with their daily routine. The game he once loved became some kind of work, and the only thing that held him back was the character he fell in love with at first sight.

All 4 years of playing “RtN”, Aris did not cease to be number one in his heart, and the only, real desire that he hoped for most of all was to meet her...

And then, on one of these gray days, events take a rapid turn, in which a thief penetrates the main character, marking a night of change.

It is from these events that you will begin to delve into the history of Don, getting to know his personality type, past, as well as moral convictions, feeling the illusory feeling of righteousness with contradiction.
